description: Legal testimony declaring that Hassun of Ascalon was the father of Abū Saʿd, the illegitimate son of Wuhsha the Broker. Mentions Abū ʿAlī al-Parnas Yefet b. Maṣliaḥ, Ibn al-Sukkarī, Ḥalfon ha-Kohen b. Yosef and Abū Naṣr al-Kohen Ibn al-Kamūkhī. Bifolio 2v of a court register in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe consisting of four pages and containing four court cases. Not dated, but other folios in this set are from 1129 CE and 1135 CE. (Information in part from CUDL)
tags: legitimacy, testimony, Wuhsha, Muslim husband, paternity, intermarriage, debt, Halfon b. Menashshe, women
description_he: עדות משפטית שחסון מאשקלון הוא אביו של אבו סעד, הבן הלא חוקי של וח'שה הסרסורית. מפנקס בית הדין בכתב חלפון בן מנשה, כ-1129–1135.
